sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68902" key="mousomanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουσο-μᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n68902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devoted to melody</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τέττιξ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="2" id="n68902.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
